name: the-y-coding-standard
description: Yash Singh's opinionated coding standards plugin: Python, React/Next.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java/Spring, C++, Postgres, OOP (SOLID + relationship types). Ships the agentic engineering stack (AGENTS.md, plans/findings/progress/skills), a full Sprint Loop (/y-office-hours through /y-retro), and a parallel-agent governance audit (/y-govern) inspired by Microsoft's agent-governance-toolkit.
